hero.title: Aralel GmbH
hero.subtitle: Software, digital products, and public portfolio
hero.text: Aralel builds and operates digital products for the web, mobile devices, and desktop platforms. This website is the company’s official presence and brings together our publicly available productions so partners, clients, and visitors can review the portfolio clearly.

apps.title: Applications
apps.subtitle: Public-facing applications from our portfolio with direct access to detail pages and live releases.

about.title: Company
about.subtitle: How Aralel works and what this website shows

blocks.title: What Aralel stands for
blocks.text: Aralel builds digital products with an emphasis on clarity, engineering quality, and long-term maintainability. We work across applications, websites, and interactive experiences built for real usage.

blocks.title: How we work
blocks.text: Our process combines product thinking, design, and engineering. The goal is not surface-level presence but durable products with clean execution, understandable structure, and a consistent user experience.

blocks.title: What this portfolio shows
blocks.text: This website documents publicly released productions by Aralel GmbH. Each product page makes clear what the product is, which platforms it is available on, and how it can be accessed publicly.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Talk to us about products, projects, or collaboration

hero.title: Join Aralel
hero.text: We work with talented freelancers and part-time collaborators. If you're passionate about what you build, we'd love to work with you.

careers.applyText: Send us a short intro and a link to your portfolio or LinkedIn.

roles.title: Ruby on Rails Backend Developer
roles.description: Build and maintain scalable backend APIs, services, and internal tooling. Strong knowledge of Rails, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL expected.
roles.extendedDescription: You'll work closely with our product team to design, build, and maintain the backend systems that power Aralel's applications. This is a freelance engagement with flexible hours, focused on delivering clean, well-tested Rails code.
requirements: 3+ years of experience with Ruby on Rails
Solid knowledge of REST API design and PostgreSQL
Comfortable with test-driven development (RSpec or Minitest)
Experience with cloud deployment (Heroku, AWS, or similar)
Familiarity with background jobs (Sidekiq) and caching is a plus
roles.emailSubject: Application: Ruby on Rails Backend Developer

roles.title: Unity Developer
roles.description: Develop cross-platform games and interactive experiences in Unity. Experience with mobile builds, physics systems, and Unity UI is a plus.
roles.extendedDescription: You'll collaborate on game features, tooling, and platform integrations across mobile and desktop Unity projects. We value clean code, good communication, and an eye for detail in interactive experiences.
requirements: 2+ years of professional Unity development
Experience shipping mobile or desktop games to app stores
Proficiency with Unity UI Toolkit or uGUI
Solid understanding of C# and object-oriented design patterns
Experience with physics, animation controllers, and input systems is a plus

roles.title: 3D Blender Artist
roles.description: Create high-quality 3D models, animations, and visual assets for games and apps. You'll collaborate closely on art direction and asset pipeline.
roles.extendedDescription: You'll produce 3D models, textures, and animations that feed directly into our game and app projects. We're looking for someone who can work efficiently within art direction guidelines while also bringing their own creative input.
requirements: Proficiency in Blender (modeling, rigging, animation)
Experience creating game-ready assets with optimized poly counts
Strong understanding of PBR materials and texture pipelines
Portfolio demonstrating 3D work (required)
Experience with Unity or Unreal asset export is a plus

roles.title: Content Manager
roles.description: Own content creation and editorial planning across Aralel's channels — from store listings and social media to product copy and blog posts.
roles.extendedDescription: You'll manage the editorial calendar, write and edit content for web, app stores, and social channels, and help grow Aralel's online presence. This is a part-time, async-friendly freelance role with a lot of creative ownership.
requirements: Experience creating content for digital brands or software products
Strong writing and editing skills in English (German is a plus)
Familiarity with SEO best practices and content planning
Comfortable managing social media channels and editorial calendars
Experience with app store optimization (ASO) is a bonus

roles.title: Customer Success Specialist
roles.description: Support our users across apps and games — handling inquiries, gathering feedback, and making sure every interaction leaves a good impression.
roles.extendedDescription: You'll be the first point of contact for user questions and feedback. This role is lightweight but meaningful — we want someone who genuinely cares about users and can help us close the loop between product and the people using it.
requirements: Experience in customer support, success, or community management
Strong written communication skills in English (German is a plus)
Comfortable using support tools (Zendesk, Intercom, or similar)
Proactive mindset with attention to detail
Interest in apps, games, or digital products is a bonus

roles.title: Part-time CEO
roles.description: Lead company direction, business development, partnerships, and operations on a part-time basis. Looking for entrepreneurial experience and a hands-on mindset.
roles.extendedDescription: Aralel is a lean, product-driven company. We're looking for a part-time CEO who can bring strategic clarity, build external relationships, and help move the business forward — without bureaucracy. This is a rare opportunity to co-shape a focused software studio.
requirements: Proven entrepreneurial or executive leadership experience
Strong network in tech, gaming, or digital product industries
Ability to drive business development and strategic partnerships
Comfortable operating in a lean, remote-first environment
Passion for digital products and software craftsmanship

hero.title: Software specialists for hire
hero.text: Beyond our own products, Aralel works as a software partner. Whether you need extra hands on a running project, an independent audit, or a new application built from scratch, we bring product thinking and engineering quality to your team.

services.introText: We are software specialists. We plug into existing teams to add capacity, review and demystify what you already have, and design and build new web, mobile, and automation projects end to end.

form.title: Discuss a project
form.subtitle: Tell us what you need help with and we'll get back to you.

groups.title: Team & advisory
groups.summary: Plug us into your team for extra capacity, an independent review, or long-term upkeep.

items.title: Extra capacity & expert help
items.text: Need more man hours or specialist support on a running project? We integrate with your team to add capacity, unblock delivery, and keep momentum — without lowering the bar.

items.title: Code & product audits
items.text: An independent review of your codebase, architecture, or product. We surface risks, technical debt, and quick wins with clear, actionable recommendations.

items.title: Maintenance & support
items.text: We keep shipped products healthy across every store — updates, bug fixes, OS and SDK upgrades, and ongoing support so your app stays live and reliable.

groups.title: Web application development
groups.summary: Custom web apps and internal tools built with clean architecture, from first design to production.

items.title: Web applications
items.text: Custom web apps built for real usage — from internal tools to customer-facing platforms — with clean architecture and code that stays maintainable.

items.title: UX & product design
items.text: Clear, focused interfaces designed around real usage — from product thinking and flows to polished, consistent UI.

items.title: Complex logic & data
items.text: Non-trivial computation done right — precise algorithms, calculation engines, and data-heavy logic, like the astronomical engine in our Solar Compass.

groups.title: Mobile app development
groups.summary: Native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android, shipped to the stores and built to last.

items.title: Mobile apps
items.text: Native mobile apps for iOS and Android, shipped to the stores and built to last.

items.title: Cross-platform delivery
items.text: One product on every platform. We build experiences that run on web, iOS, and Android from a shared codebase — the same approach behind our own Arena Sudoku.

items.title: Game development & gamification
items.text: Interactive and game experiences in Unity, plus gamified engagement layers — points, streaks, and leaderboards — for non-game products.

groups.title: Bluetooth, devices & connectivity
groups.summary: Bluetooth and BLE apps, realtime multiplayer, and connected-device integrations.

items.title: Bluetooth & BLE apps
items.text: Apps that talk to nearby phones and hardware over Bluetooth and Bluetooth LE — pairing, advertising, and local sessions. It's the core of our Rock Paper Bluetooth and Wireless Deck products.

items.title: Realtime & multiplayer
items.text: Live, shared state across devices with WebSockets — multiplayer sessions, synced boards, scoring, and leaderboards, as in our realtime Arena Sudoku.

items.title: Connected devices & diagnostics
items.text: Wireless scanning, signal inspection, and device integrations on the edge between software and hardware — the kind of work behind our Wi-Fi and BLE radar tooling.

groups.title: Reach, localization & compliance
groups.summary: Ship to every store, in every language, with privacy built in.

items.title: Multi-store release & ASO
items.text: Release management and store optimization across the App Store, Google Play, Amazon Appstore, and the Mac App Store — listings, assets, review, and compliance. We publish to all of them.

items.title: Localization & RTL
items.text: Multilingual products done right, including full right-to-left support and Arabic shaping — the same i18n work behind our German-learning apps and Ad Verbum.

items.title: Privacy-first & GDPR engineering
items.text: Offline-by-design, no-telemetry architectures and GDPR/DSGVO-compliant builds — privacy treated as a feature, not an afterthought.

groups.title: Automation & digitalization
groups.summary: Automate manual work, modernize processes, and add intelligent features.

items.title: Automation
items.text: Automate repetitive work and connect your tools. We design and build automations and integrations that remove manual effort and reduce errors.

items.title: Digitalization
items.text: Turn manual, paper-based, or fragmented processes into reliable digital workflows. We help you digitalize and modernize how your business operates.

items.title: AI integration
items.text: Bring AI into your product where it actually helps — assistants, search, classification, and content features wired into your existing apps and data.

hero.title: About Aralel
hero.text: Aralel GmbH is a software studio that builds and operates digital products for the web, mobile, and desktop — and a partner for teams that need software built well.

blocks.title: What Aralel stands for
blocks.text: Aralel builds digital products with an emphasis on clarity, engineering quality, and long-term maintainability. We work across applications, websites, and interactive experiences built for real usage.

blocks.title: How we work
blocks.text: Our process combines product thinking, design, and engineering. The goal is not surface-level presence but durable products with clean execution, understandable structure, and a consistent user experience.

blocks.title: What we build
blocks.text: We design, build, and operate web apps, mobile apps for iOS and Android, and desktop software for Mac. Our public portfolio spans utilities, education, and games — each documented with what it is, which platforms it runs on, and how to access it.

blocks.title: Work with us
blocks.text: Beyond our own portfolio, we work as a software partner — adding capacity to existing teams, auditing codebases, and building web apps, mobile apps, automations, and digitalization projects.

company.imageAlt: Aralel GmbH logo on an illuminated office reception wall

app.heroText: These applications are currently public as part of the Aralel portfolio, with direct links to their store releases and supporting websites across mobile, desktop, and the web.

game.heroText: These games and interactive productions are currently public within the Aralel portfolio

availabell.name: Availabell
availabell.shortSummary: Share your current availability with family, teams, and the people who need to reach you.
availabell.heroText: Availabell helps people communicate when they are reachable and gives groups a fast way to see who is free before making the next call.
availabell.description: It is built for families, small teams, and distributed contacts who want a lightweight call-readiness signal instead of another heavy coordination tool.

highlights.title: Shared status
highlights.text: Let others know when you are open for a call or callback.

highlights.title: Built for groups
highlights.text: See who is currently available before you start the next conversation.

highlights.title: Focused Android utility
highlights.text: A simple, practical companion designed for everyday communication.

availabell.availabilityText: Currently published as an Android app on Google Play.
availabell.metaDescription: Availabell is Aralel’s Android app for sharing call availability with family, teams, and contacts.

cyrus-cylinder.name: Cyrus Cylinder
cyrus-cylinder.shortSummary: Learn German by rotating word parts into real combinations.
cyrus-cylinder.heroText: Cyrus Cylinder turns German practice into a rotating word-building exercise that helps learners align prefixes, middles, and suffixes into valid words.
cyrus-cylinder.description: Each correct combination is reinforced with pronunciation and meaning so the app supports quick, focused vocabulary sessions.

highlights.title: Cylinder-based play
highlights.text: Rotate word parts into place and discover valid German combinations.

highlights.title: Instant pronunciation
highlights.text: Hear words immediately and connect spelling to sound.

highlights.title: Short learning loops
highlights.text: Designed for fast, repeatable language practice throughout the day.

cyrus-cylinder.availabilityText: Published on Google Play and on the App Store for iPhone and iPad.
cyrus-cylinder.metaDescription: Cyrus Cylinder is Aralel’s German-learning app built around rotating word-part combinations.

anava.name: Anava
anava.shortSummary: Record daily supplications, gratitude, and spiritual routines in one calm place.
anava.heroTitle: A quiet companion for daily reflection
anava.heroText: Anava helps people capture daily duas and gratitude moments while building a more intentional view of their spiritual journey.
anava.description: It combines personal journaling with supportive guidance around prayer-related routines and a focused, low-noise mobile experience.

highlights.title: Daily entries
highlights.text: Capture supplications, reflections, and gratitude moments in a structured way.

highlights.title: Spiritual guidance
highlights.text: Use the app as a calm anchor for recurring routines and reflection.

highlights.title: Gentle onboarding
highlights.text: Improved navigation and onboarding make it easier to start and stay consistent.

anava.availabilityText: Published as an Android app on Google Play.
anava.metaDescription: Anava is Aralel’s Android app for daily supplications, gratitude, and spiritual reflection.

a-solar-compass.name: Solar Compass
a-solar-compass.shortSummary: Calculate the exact local moment when the sun aligns with a target bearing.
a-solar-compass.heroText: Solar Compass computes the local moment when the sun’s azimuth lines up with any bearing between your source position and a target point on Earth.
a-solar-compass.description: It combines precise calculation with live countdowns, reminders, and widgets so the critical alignment window is easy to track.

highlights.title: Solar alignment engine
highlights.text: Built on real astronomical calculations instead of rough estimates.

highlights.title: Countdown and reminders
highlights.text: Stay oriented with a live timer and pre-alignment notifications.

highlights.title: GPS or manual input
highlights.text: Use your location automatically or work with exact coordinates.

a-solar-compass.availabilityText: Published as an Android app on Google Play.
a-solar-compass.metaDescription: Solar Compass is Aralel’s Android tool for precise sun-alignment calculations, countdowns, and reminders.

wireless-deck.name: Wireless Deck
wireless-deck.shortSummary: Inspect nearby Wi-Fi networks and Bluetooth LE devices from your Mac.
wireless-deck.heroTitle: Inspect the wireless environment around your Mac
wireless-deck.heroText: Wireless Deck combines Wi-Fi and Bluetooth radar views so you can scan nearby networks and BLE devices, compare signal conditions, and troubleshoot radio visibility locally.
wireless-deck.description: The app is built for Mac-side wireless diagnostics. It lets you search and filter live results, copy visible rows, reopen cached scans on launch, and use an optional debug console when you need deeper insight into permissions or device visibility.

highlights.title: Wi-Fi radar
highlights.text: See nearby SSIDs, BSSIDs, channel, band, signal, noise, security, and router hints in one view.

highlights.title: Bluetooth LE sweep
highlights.text: Inspect nearby BLE devices, compare signal strength, and review advertising details.

highlights.title: Local diagnostics
highlights.text: Search, filter, copy, and debug without creating an account or uploading scan results.

wireless-deck.availabilityText: Published as a Mac app on the App Store.
wireless-deck.metaDescription: Wireless Deck is Aralel’s Mac utility for inspecting nearby Wi-Fi and Bluetooth environments.

ai-usage-menubar.name: AI Usage Menubar
ai-usage-menubar.shortSummary: Keep an eye on your Claude AI message quota right from the Mac menu bar.
ai-usage-menubar.heroTitle: Monitor your Claude AI limits, live
ai-usage-menubar.heroText: AI Usage Menubar puts your Claude AI message quota in the macOS menu bar, with a colour-coded progress bar and live daily and weekly reset countdowns, so you never lose track of your remaining usage.
ai-usage-menubar.description: The app signs in through a secure in-app browser using your existing claude.ai session, so no separate password or API key is required and your credentials are never stored. Choose from seven menu bar display styles, from full percentage and countdown detail down to an icon-only view, and see plan name, tokens consumed, and time until your next reset at a glance.

highlights.title: Live quota tracking
highlights.text: Messages used versus your plan limit, shown as a colour-coded progress bar in the menu bar.

highlights.title: Reset countdowns
highlights.text: Daily and weekly reset timers update live, alongside tokens consumed and your plan name.

highlights.title: Private by design
highlights.text: Reuses your existing claude.ai session; usage data is fetched directly and never leaves your device.

ai-usage-menubar.availabilityText: Published as a Mac app on the App Store.
ai-usage-menubar.metaDescription: AI Usage Menubar is Aralel’s Mac menu bar app for tracking Claude AI message quota and reset times live.

streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.name: Streakbox – Gamify Daily Visit
streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.shortSummary: Reward logged-in customers with a daily gift that grows the longer their streak lasts.
streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.heroTitle: Turn daily visits into a habit customers love
streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.heroText: Streakbox rewards logged-in customers with a daily gift that grows the longer their visit streak lasts, using a formula you choose: flat, Fibonacci, or a fully custom table.
streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.description: Set reward rules that turn points into discounts, free shipping, or free products, each with an optional minimum purchase. Add a floating claim button or a gift-calendar block anywhere in your theme, and track visits, streaks, and redemptions from one simple admin dashboard.

highlights.title: Streaks that grow
highlights.text: Reward daily visits with points that grow the longer the streak lasts, using a flat, Fibonacci, or fully custom formula.

highlights.title: Flexible reward rules
highlights.text: Convert points into discounts, free shipping, or free products automatically, each with an optional minimum purchase.

highlights.title: One dashboard, full visibility
highlights.text: Track visits, streaks, and redemptions from a single admin dashboard, with a branded gift-calendar widget on the storefront.

streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.primaryCta: View on the Shopify App Store
streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.availabilityText: Published as a Shopify app on the Shopify App Store.
streakbox-gamify-daily-visit.metaDescription: Streakbox is Aralel’s Shopify app that rewards logged-in customers with a growing daily gift for keeping their visit streak alive.

messagram-app.name: Messagram App
messagram-app.shortSummary: Import Messenger text backups and browse them privately on your Mac.
messagram-app.heroTitle: A privacy-first viewer for chat backups
messagram-app.heroText: Messagram imports exported Messenger .txt backups and lets you browse, search, and jump through conversations locally on your Mac without sending the data anywhere.
messagram-app.description: The app is focused on offline reading and search. You can import multiple backups at once, browse familiar chat-style threads, run full-text search inside a chat or across all imported chats, jump to a specific date, and keep every file stored locally in the app container.

highlights.title: Batch import
highlights.text: Bring in multiple exported text backups at once with drag and drop or the file picker.

highlights.title: Conversation and global search
highlights.text: Search within a chat or across your entire imported archive with highlighted matches.

highlights.title: Offline by design
highlights.text: No analytics, no cloud sync, no account login, and no data transmission.

messagram-app.availabilityText: Published as a Mac app on the App Store.
messagram-app.metaDescription: Messagram App is Aralel’s Mac viewer for Messenger text backups, built for local search and private browsing.

german-word-search.name: German Word Search
german-word-search.shortSummary: Build German vocabulary and articles through themed word-search puzzles.
german-word-search.heroText: German Word Search turns vocabulary practice into a playful loop of themed grids, article recognition, and repeatable challenge levels.
german-word-search.description: With 15 categories, multiple difficulty levels, and extra support like pronunciation and translations, it is designed for steady language progress.

highlights.title: 15 themed categories
highlights.text: Every session trains practical vocabulary, from animals to city life.

highlights.title: Three difficulty levels
highlights.text: Start easy and scale up to denser, more demanding puzzles.

highlights.title: Learning feedback
highlights.text: Pronunciation, translations, and progress systems reinforce retention.

german-word-search.availabilityText: Published as an Android game on Google Play.
german-word-search.metaDescription: German Word Search is Aralel’s vocabulary game for learning German words and articles through puzzle play.

arena-sudoku.name: Arena Sudoku
arena-sudoku.shortSummary: A realtime Sudoku experience where players solve the same board together.
arena-sudoku.heroText: Arena Sudoku turns a familiar logic game into a multiplayer challenge where speed, accuracy, and shared board state matter across web and mobile devices.
arena-sudoku.description: Players work on the same puzzle, watch live updates, and compete through scoring, history, and leaderboard-style progression whether they join in the browser or through the mobile versions.

highlights.title: Shared board
highlights.text: Everyone sees the same puzzle and the same live progress.

highlights.title: Competitive scoring
highlights.text: Correct moves contribute directly to the match outcome.

highlights.title: Always available modes
highlights.text: Easy, medium, and hard sessions stay ready to join.

arena-sudoku.availabilityText: Available on the web at sudoku.aralel.com, on Google Play, and on the App Store.
arena-sudoku.metaDescription: Arena Sudoku is Aralel’s realtime multiplayer Sudoku game for the web and mobile devices.

hedortal.name: Hedortal
hedortal.shortSummary: A fast coin-flip arcade game where timing decides your score.
hedortal.heroText: Hedortal turns a simple coin flip into a compact arcade challenge where stopping at the right moment is the whole game.
hedortal.description: The experience stays intentionally minimal: short rounds, immediate feedback, and repeatable attempts with direct score impact.

highlights.title: One tap matters
highlights.text: Stop the spinning coin at the right moment and push your score higher.

highlights.title: Quick sessions
highlights.text: Built for fast play loops whenever you have a minute.

highlights.title: Clear rules
highlights.text: No clutter, just reaction, rhythm, and repetition.

hedortal.availabilityText: Currently published for iPhone and iPad on the App Store.
hedortal.metaDescription: Hedortal is Aralel’s fast coin-flip arcade game for iPhone and iPad.

rock-paper-bluetooth.name: Rock Paper Bluetooth
rock-paper-bluetooth.shortSummary: Local rock-paper-scissors over Bluetooth with leaderboards and instant rematches.
rock-paper-bluetooth.heroTitle: A classic turned into a local duel
rock-paper-bluetooth.heroText: Rock Paper Bluetooth brings rock-paper-scissors to iPhone and iPad as a quick local multiplayer game that works without internet.
rock-paper-bluetooth.description: It combines immediate Bluetooth sessions with Game Center progress, unlockable achievements, and a stronger competitive loop.

highlights.title: Bluetooth multiplayer
highlights.text: Host or join nearby matches without needing an internet connection.

highlights.title: Instant rematches
highlights.text: Short rounds and quick restarts keep the pace high.

highlights.title: Game Center progression
highlights.text: Leaderboards, history, and achievements give the classic more depth.

rock-paper-bluetooth.availabilityText: Currently published for iPhone and iPad on the App Store.
rock-paper-bluetooth.metaDescription: Rock Paper Bluetooth is Aralel’s Bluetooth-powered local duel game for iPhone and iPad.

ad-verbum.name: Ad Verbum
ad-verbum.shortSummary: Memorize scripture and text by guiding a snake to eat words in the right order.
ad-verbum.heroText: Ad Verbum turns text memorization into a fast, tactile snake game where you collect words of a chosen phrase in order while avoiding decoys.
ad-verbum.description: Pick from built-in tracks or paste your own text. The snake wraps the board, words attach to its head as a readable trail, and streak-based scoring rewards accuracy without punishing early mistakes too harshly.

highlights.title: Any text you choose
highlights.text: Start with built-in scripture passages or paste your own text at any time.

highlights.title: Full Arabic and RTL support
highlights.text: Designed from the ground up for correct right-to-left rendering and letter shaping.

highlights.title: Multiple control modes
highlights.text: Play with keyboard, controller, touch, TV remote, or device motion.

ad-verbum.availabilityText: Published on the Amazon Appstore for Android and Fire TV.
ad-verbum.metaDescription: Ad Verbum is Aralel’s word memorization snake game for Android and Fire TV.
